label: hint_following
hint_value: Tie a small knot at the connecting end of the left hand one.

The options are A) Tie a small knot at the connecting end of the left one, or B) Tie the knot at the speaker end of the left one. A Stanford professor says the answer is A. question_text: To tell your right and left ear buds apart without looking

choices.A: Tie a small knot at the connecting end of the left hand one.
choices.B: Tie a small knot at the speaker end of the left hand one.
